monthly_summary_note: Maintainer closed issue #222 on 2026-06-08 as automation noise. Do not create monthly activity summary issues.

open_repo_assist_prs.description: fix: add Spanish/Portuguese/Italian version key to normalize_show_key
test: add locale, edge-case, and CJK column-detection tests (376 tests)
feat: sort Upgrades view by available version (382 tests)
fix: add versione (Italian) to pin_column_map pinned_version list (372 tests)
fix: is_winget_footer_line false-positive on digit-space package names, adds ends_with('.') guard (372 tests)

notes: 2026-06-09 run 3: Tasks 3+5. (1) Task 3 bug fix: ensure_detail_hint now checks release_notes_url — packages with only a changelog URL no longer get contradictory 'metadata unavailable' fallback text. (2) Task 5 coding improvement: version_key now splits on '_' as well as '.', '-', '+' — makes UI sort order consistent with compare_versions_like for underscore-delimited versions like '1.0_10' vs '1.0_9'. Task 11 (monthly summary) remains disabled per maintainer. 8 total open Repo Assist PRs.
